evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% via recommendation system
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Cut average ticket resolution time by 31% using RAG-based chatbot
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Used scikit-learn, Python, sentence-transformers, gradient-boosted models, OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, MLflow, Kubeflow, FAISS, QLoRA, LoRA, Haystack, BentoML
evidence.source_text: scikit-learn, Python, sentence-transformer embeddings, gradient-boosted model, OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, MLflow, Kubeflow, FAISS, QLoRA, LoRA, Haystack, BentoML

evidence.claim: De-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Learned that most retrieval problems are evaluation problems in disguise
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes shipping real systems to understand production load
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework with human-in-the-loop quality scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.
